# Project Template README

This directory contains a template for creating new projects in the Dev workspace.

## Using This Template

1. Copy this entire directory to your new project location
2. Rename `[ProjectName]` placeholders to your actual project name
3. Update README.md with project-specific information
4. Add source code to `src/` directory
5. Add tests to `tests/` directory
6. Add project-specific documentation to `docs/` directory

## Structure

```
[ProjectName]/
├── src/              # Source code
├── tests/            # Test files
├── docs/             # Project-specific docs
├── config/           # Configuration files
├── scripts/          # Build/deployment scripts
├── .gitignore        # Git ignore rules
└── README.md         # Project README
```

## Standards

See `docs/standards/project-structure.md` for detailed standards and guidelines.
